newspiece: AI Power Grid now supports real-time token streaming via OpenAI-compatible endpoints. Connect your worker with `--streaming` to enable WebSocket mode.
title: Streaming API live

newspiece: The Grid API now supports both OpenAI (`/v1/chat/completions`) and Anthropic (`/v1/messages`) compatible endpoints with real `stream: true` support.
title: OpenAI and Anthropic compatible endpoints

newspiece: AI Power Grid has launched on Base L2. Workers earn AIPG tokens for contributing GPU compute to the decentralized inference network.
title: AI Power Grid launch on Base L2
